info.name: Well-Being Platform API
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Well-Being Web Platform. 

**Setup:**
1. Set the `baseUrl` variable to your server (default: http://localhost:5000)
2. Run **Register** or **Login** first — the token auto-saves to `authToken`
3. All protected routes automatically use the saved token via collection-level auth
4. **Blog:** **Create** / **Create (Draft)** test scripts save `blogPostId` and `blogSlug`. Admin update/delete and **Get by ID (admin)** use `blogPostId`. Public **Get by Slug** uses `blogSlug`.
5. **Admin list GETs** (users, programs, blog, payments, consultations, testimonials admin, camp participants, Cal event types): use `?page=1&limit=20` (limit max 100). **Get All Users** accepts optional `?search=` (first name, last name, email). **Get All Consultations** accepts optional `?search=` (user name/email, service title) and optional `?status=` (`PENDING`, `PENDING_PAYMENT`, `CONFIRMED`, `CANCELLED`, `COMPLETED`). **Get All Programs** — public `GET /api/programs` and admin `GET /api/programs/admin/all` — accepts optional `?search=` (title, description) and optional `?category=` (`LEADERS`, `STUDENTS`, `PROFESSIONALS`). Public list is unpaginated `{ data }`; admin list is paginated `{ data, meta }`. **Newsletter:** `POST /api/newsletter/subscribe` (JSON: `email`, optional `source`) stores locally and syncs to Resend Contacts when `RESEND_API_KEY` is set; optional comma-separated `RESEND_NEWSLETTER_SEGMENT_IDS`. `GET /api/newsletter/unsubscribe?token=` — browser redirect to `CLIENT_URL` query flags; `?format=json` or `Accept: application/json` returns JSON. **Admin:** `GET /api/admin/newsletter/subscriptions` — paginated (`page`, `limit`), optional `search` (email/source), optional `status` (`all`|`active`|`unsubscribed`); excludes `unsubscribeToken` from rows. **Programmes (learner progress):** `GET /api/dashboard` includes `progress` on each purchased programme (`payment` SUCCESS). `GET /api/dashboard/programs/:id` merges `completedAt` on modules plus `progress`. `POST /api/dashboard/programs/:programId/modules/:moduleId/complete` records module completion when the learner finishes — idempotent.

**Seeded Admin:**
- Email: admin@wellbeing.com
- Password: Admin@1234

request.description: Verify the server is running.
No auth. Stricter rate limit (30/15min). Saves to PostgreSQL and syncs to Resend Contacts when RESEND_API_KEY is set.
Token from DB newsletter_subscriptions.unsubscribeToken after subscribe — paste into collection variable newsletterUnsubscribeToken. Omit format/json for 302 redirect to CLIENT_URL.
Omits unsubscribeToken per row for security.
Create a new user account. Sends a verification email; token is saved to `authToken`. Response user includes `isEmailVerified` (false until verified).
Login with existing credentials. Use admin@wellbeing.com / Admin@1234 for the seeded admin account.
Send the Google ID token (JWT) from Google Identity Services or the mobile SDK. Set `GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID` in server `.env` to your OAuth Web Client ID. Same response shape as Login.

Returns the authenticated user: core fields plus Settings — phone, timezone, notifyEmail, notifyProgramReminders, notifyPush, hasPassword — and createdAt.
OAuth-only accounts typically have hasPassword false.

Partial update (send at least one field). Allowed: firstName, lastName, email, phone (string or null to clear), timezone (IANA e.g. Africa/Lagos, or null/"" to clear). Changing email sets isEmailVerified false and triggers a verification email; server sets a refreshed auth cookie (browser clients).
Requires an existing hashed password on the account. Google-only accounts (no password): use Forgot password flow or omit this call. Incorrect currentPassword returns 401.
Partial PATCH: include at least one of notifyEmail, notifyProgramReminders, notifyPush (booleans). Defaults on new users match the product: email=true, reminders=false, push=true.

Confirm email using the token from the verification email (48h expiry). Set `verifyToken` from the email link query string. Response `data`: id, firstName, lastName, email, role, isEmailVerified, createdAt — use GET /me for Settings fields.
Logged-in users only. Sends a new verification link if the account is not yet verified.
Sends a password reset link to the provided email. Always returns 200 to prevent email enumeration.
Reset the password using the token from the reset email. Token expires in 15 minutes.
Published programs only. Optional filters: search, category (program type). No auth.
Returns program details and lesson titles (no video URLs until purchased).
Admin only. Paginated. Optional search + category (program type). Programs (published and unpublished) with week/purchase _counts. Response: { data, meta }.

formdata.value: Transform your mental wellness with this structured 30-day program.

request.description: Admin only. Creates a new program. Use form-data to optionally attach a thumbnail image.

formdata.description: Set to true to publish, false to unpublish

request.description: Admin only. Updates any program fields. Set isPublished=true to make it visible to users.
Admin only. Permanently deletes a program and all its lessons.

formdata.value: What mindfulness is and why it matters.
Welcome to lesson one. In this lesson we explore...

request.description: Admin only. Adds a lesson to a program. Can include video upload and/or file upload.
Admin only. Updates a specific lesson.
Admin only. Deletes a specific lesson from a program.
Returns all upcoming and ongoing camps. No auth required. Each camp includes tiers, gallery images, published testimonials, benefits, seatsTaken, and seatsRemaining.

query.description: Optional. Substring on title, location, or description (case-insensitive). Max 100 chars.
Optional. UPCOMING | ONGOING | COMPLETED | CANCELLED. Omit for all statuses.

request.description: Admin only. Paginated `{ data, meta }`. All camp statuses unless `status` query is set. `_count` includes registrations (for “enrolled” columns), tiers, images.
Next upcoming camp (earliest UPCOMING) for the landing page. Test script saves campId and first campTierId when present.
Returns full camp details including tiers, images, published testimonials, benefits, seatsTaken, and seatsRemaining.

Submits a camp application. tierId is required when the camp has tiers. applicantDetails captures dietary info, emergency contact, partyMembers for Couple/Family, etc. Initialize payment with campRegistrationId; amount uses the tier price.

formdata.value: A presence-based retreat to pause, reflect, and reconnect.

formdata.description: Optional; tier prices are authoritative for payment

formdata.value: ["Pause and reconnect with yourself","Experience guided reflective practices","Build meaningful connections","Gain clarity and emotional balance"]

request.description: Admin only. Creates a camp. Add participation tiers separately. benefits powers the Why attend list; price is optional when using tiers.

formdata.value: ["Pause and reconnect with yourself","Experience guided reflective practices","Build meaningful connections","Gain clarity and emotional balance"]

request.description: Admin only. Partial update. Status options: UPCOMING, ONGOING, COMPLETED, CANCELLED. Patch benefits, currency, capacity, etc.
Admin only. Deletes a camp.
Admin only. Paginated list for this camp. Response: { data, meta }.

body.raw:
{
  "label": "Individual",
  "description": "Single attendee",
  "price": 500,
  "inclusions": ["Accommodation", "Meals", "Guided sessions", "Community activities", "Reflection materials"],
  "seatsPerUnit": 1,
  "maxUnits": null,
  "order": 0,
  "isFeatured": false
}

request.description: Admin only. Creates a participation package. seatsPerUnit consumes camp capacity seats per purchase.
Admin only. Partial tier update.
Admin only. Deletes a tier.

formdata.description: Optional JSON array aligned with files
Repeat field images for multiple uploads (max 12)

request.description: Admin only. Multipart field images (repeat). Optional captions JSON array.
Admin only. Update caption/order for a gallery image.
Admin only. Deletes a gallery image record.
Published testimonials. Add ?campId={{campId}} to filter by camp.
Single testimonial by id.
Admin only. Paginated. Optional campId. Response: { data, meta }.

formdata.value: A transformative experience — I left with real clarity and peace.

request.description: Admin only. Multipart create with optional avatar file.
Admin only. Multipart partial update.
Admin only. Deletes a testimonial.

query.description: optional — case-insensitive match on title or excerpt
use with limit — if either is set, response includes meta { total, page, limit, totalPages }
max 100; default 20 when only page is set

request.description: Public. Published posts only, newest first. Optional filters: category, search (or q). Omit page & limit to return the full list (no meta). With page or limit, response includes meta pagination.
Public. Same as Get All with category query. Change category value as needed.
Public. One published post by slug (full body). 404 if draft. Uses collection variable blogSlug (set by Create requests).

query.description: optional — q works too; title, excerpt, slug

request.description: Admin only. Always paginated (default page=1, limit=20). Optional filters: status, category, search or q. Response: { data, meta }.
Admin only. Single post by id (draft or published). Set blogPostId from List or from Create test script.

formdata.value: Learning to Sit With Your Emotions
Understanding your emotions without rushing to fix them can lead to deeper clarity and lasting growth.

## Intro

Full article body (markdown or HTML).

- Point one
- Point two

request.description: Admin only. Multipart. Required: title, excerpt, body, category. Optional slug, readTimeMinutes, isPublished, cover image or coverImageUrl.

formdata.value: In a fast-paced world, creating space to pause can improve clarity.

## Draft

Content not visible on the public blog until published.

request.description: Admin only. isPublished false — visible in admin list only until you publish.
Admin only. Partial PATCH (minimal example). Add title, excerpt, body, slug parts with non-empty values to change them — empty strings error.

formdata.value: Learning to Sit With Your Emotions (updated title)
Updated excerpt — still about sitting with emotions without rushing to fix them.

## Updated

New content for the article body. Tables, links, etc.

request.description: Admin only. Full PATCH example with title, excerpt, body, slug.
Admin only. Permanently deletes the post. Uses blogPostId.
Returns all active consultation services. No auth required.
Returns a single consultation service detail.
Books a consultation for the logged-in user. After this, initialize payment using the returned consultation ID.
Returns all consultations booked by the logged-in user.

query.description: Substring on user first/last/email and service title (case-insensitive). Max 100 chars.

request.description: Admin only. Paginated. Optional filters: search, status (ConsultationStatus). Response: { data, meta }.
Admin only. Updates consultation status. Options: PENDING, CONFIRMED, CANCELLED, COMPLETED.
Admin only. Creates a new consultation service offering.
Admin only. Updates a consultation service. Set isActive=false to hide it from users.
Initializes a Paystack payment for a program purchase. Returns an authorizationUrl — redirect the user to this URL to complete payment.
Initializes Paystack for a camp application. itemId is the camp registration id. Amount uses the tier price (or legacy camp.price).
Initializes a Paystack payment for a consultation booking.
Check the status of a payment by its reference. Called by the frontend after Paystack redirects back.
Admin only. Paginated. Response: { data, meta }.

header.description: In production this is sent by Paystack automatically. For local testing use Paystack CLI.

request.description: ⚠️ For local testing only. In production, Paystack calls this automatically. Use Paystack CLI (paystack listen) to forward real webhook events to localhost.
Returns purchases (each successful programme purchase includes `progress`: percent, weeks breakdown, `isProgramCompleted`, `programCompletedAt`), camp registrations, and consultations.
Purchased programme only. Full week/module tree plus `completedAt` per module and root `progress` rollup. 403 if not purchased.
Call when the learner finishes a module (e.g. video ended, quiz submitted). Idempotent. Returns updated `ProgramProgressOverview`. Sets `purchase.programCompletedAt` when 100% modules done.

Emails **admin Settings → supportEmail**. JSON: `message` (required, 10–4000 chars), `subject` optional (max 200). Sets **Reply-To** to the learner email. Respects **emailNotificationsEnabled** (mailer may no-op). Requires same auth + email verification rules as other dashboard writes.

Emails the program’s **facilitatorEmail** (set in admin program form). Requires an active **purchase** with successful payment. Same body rules as Contact support. Returns **400** if facilitator email is missing — UI can fall back to Contact support.
Admin only. Returns platform overview: total users, programs, camps, consultations, total revenue, and recent payments.

query.description: Optional. Matches substring against first name, last name, or email (case-insensitive). Max 100 characters.

request.description: Admin only. Optional `search` filters by firstName, lastName, or email. `data` is the users array (not `data.users`). Includes `meta`: total, page, limit, totalPages.
Admin only. Full user profile including all purchases, camp registrations, consultations, and payment history.

query.description: Optional. Cal.com username to scope event types (see Cal API).

request.description: Admin only. Fetches from Cal.com then paginates in memory. Response: { data, meta }.

Admin only. Singleton platform config for the dashboard Settings UI: general (name, support email, timezone, currency), features (maintenance, registration, verification, auto-enrollment), and emailNotificationsEnabled.
Note: maintenanceMode is stored for the frontend; APIs are not hard-blocked unless you add middleware.
Currency enum: NGN | USD | EUR | GBP.
enforcements: allowUserRegistration blocks email+Google signup; requireEmailVerification blocks dashboard/program content, payments, camp register, consultations list except admins; emailNotificationsEnabled=false skips outbound mail via sendMail.
Partial PATCH — at least one field. defaultTimezone must be valid IANA. currency ∈ NGN, USD, EUR, GBP.
Partial PATCH — booleans only. autoEnrollment is stored for future use (payments still create purchases as today).
PATCH with emailNotificationsEnabled (required boolean). When false, sendMail skips delivery (logged).
